# SnapLink — Repository Blueprint

**Stack:** Hono + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + Queues  
**Deployment:** Cloudflare Workers via Wrangler  
**Generated by:** Repo Builder Agent v4.2

---

## 1. Repository Structure

```
snaplink/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts                    ← Hono app entry (main Worker)
│   ├── consumer.ts                 ← CF Queue consumer Worker (click events)
│   ├── cron.ts                     ← CF Cron Trigger Worker (analytics aggregation)
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── auth.ts                 ← POST /api/auth/* (register, login, logout, refresh)
│   │   ├── links.ts                ← /api/links/* CRUD
│   │   ├── analytics.ts            ← /api/analytics/* (reads pre-computed summaries)
│   │   ├── users.ts                ← /api/users/me
│   │   └── redirect.ts             ← GET /:code (hot path)
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── auth.ts                 ← JWT verify middleware
│   │   ├── rate-limit.ts           ← Upstash sliding window (global + auth-specific)
│   │   └── request-id.ts           ← X-Request-Id header injection
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── jwt.ts                  ← sign / verify helpers (hono/jwt)
│   │   ├── password.ts             ← argon2id hash + verify (@node-rs/argon2)
│   │   └── short-code.ts           ← 6-char nanoid code generator
│   └── types.ts                    ← Env bindings type + shared types
├── migrations/
│   ├── 0001_initial_schema.sql     ← users, short_links, click_events, analytics_summaries
│   └── 0002_indexes.sql            ← Secondary indexes
├── test/
│   ├── setup.ts                    ← Miniflare test environment setup
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── auth.test.ts
│   │   ├── links.test.ts
│   │   └── redirect.test.ts
│   └── consumer.test.ts            ← Queue consumer tests
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── ci.yml                  ← Lint → type-check → test → wrangler deploy
├── wrangler.toml                   ← CF Workers config (D1, KV, Queue, Cron, Secrets)
├── .dev.vars.example               ← Local dev secrets template (replaces .env for Workers)
├── .gitleaks.toml                  ← Secret scanning config
├── SECURITY.md
├── package.json
└── tsconfig.json
```

---

## 2. wrangler.toml

```toml
name = "snaplink"
main = "src/index.ts"
compatibility_date = "2024-09-23"
compatibility_flags = ["nodejs_compat"]

# D1 Database
[[d1_databases]]
binding = "DB"
database_name = "snaplink-db"
database_id = "YOUR_D1_DATABASE_ID"
migrations_dir = "migrations"

# KV Namespace — redirect cache
[[kv_namespaces]]
binding = "REDIRECT_CACHE"
id = "YOUR_KV_NAMESPACE_ID"
preview_id = "YOUR_KV_PREVIEW_ID"

# Queue — click analytics
[[queues.producers]]
binding = "CLICK_QUEUE"
queue = "click-events"

[[queues.consumers]]
queue = "click-events"
max_batch_size = 100
max_batch_timeout = 5    # seconds
max_retries = 3

# Cron Trigger — hourly analytics aggregation
[triggers]
crons = ["0 * * * *"]

# Secrets (set via: wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET)
# JWT_SECRET
# UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
# UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN
# CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

[env.staging]
name = "snaplink-staging"

[[env.staging.d1_databases]]
binding = "DB"
database_name = "snaplink-db-staging"
database_id = "YOUR_STAGING_D1_ID"
```

---

## 3. D1 Migrations

```sql
-- migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id            TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (lower(hex(randomblob(16)))),
  email         TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  display_name  TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch()),
  updated_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch())
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS short_links (
  id              TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (lower(hex(randomblob(16)))),
  user_id         TEXT,
  code            TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  slug            TEXT UNIQUE,
  destination_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  title           TEXT,
  utm_source      TEXT,
  utm_medium      TEXT,
  utm_campaign    TEXT,
  click_count     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_active       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  is_guest        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  expires_at      INTEGER,
  created_at      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch()),
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS click_events (
  id           TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (lower(hex(randomblob(16)))),
  link_id      TEXT NOT NULL,
  country_code TEXT,
  device_type  TEXT,
  referrer     TEXT,
  user_agent   TEXT,
  clicked_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch()),
  FOREIGN KEY (link_id) REFERENCES short_links(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_summaries (
  id           TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (lower(hex(randomblob(16)))),
  user_id      TEXT NOT NULL,
  date         TEXT NOT NULL,
  total_clicks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  top_country  TEXT,
  top_referrer TEXT,
  created_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch()),
  UNIQUE(user_id, date),
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
```

```sql
-- migrations/0002_indexes.sql
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_short_links_user_id  ON short_links(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_short_links_code      ON short_links(code);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_click_events_link_id  ON click_events(link_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_click_events_time     ON click_events(clicked_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_analytics_user_date   ON analytics_summaries(user_id, date);
```

Apply migrations:
```bash
# Local (dev)
wrangler d1 migrations apply snaplink-db --local

# Production
wrangler d1 migrations apply snaplink-db --remote
```

---

## 4. Local Development

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Copy secrets template
cp .dev.vars.example .dev.vars
# Edit .dev.vars with local values

# Apply D1 migrations locally
wrangler d1 migrations apply snaplink-db --local

# Start local dev server (Miniflare)
wrangler dev

# Run tests (Miniflare-based)
npm test
```

`.dev.vars.example`:
```
JWT_SECRET=local-dev-secret-min-32-characters!!
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL=https://xxx.upstash.io
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=dev-token
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173
```

---

## 5. Testing Setup (Vitest + Miniflare)

```typescript
// vitest.config.ts
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'

export default defineConfig({
  test: {
    environment: 'miniflare',
    environmentOptions: {
      d1Databases: ['DB'],
      kvNamespaces: ['REDIRECT_CACHE'],
      queues: { 'CLICK_QUEUE': 'click-events' },
      bindings: {
        JWT_SECRET: 'test-secret-min-32-characters-long!',
        UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL: 'http://mock-upstash',
        UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN: 'mock-token',
        CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: 'http://localhost:5173',
      },
    },
  },
})
```

```typescript
// test/routes/redirect.test.ts
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest'
import { env } from 'cloudflare:test'
import app from '../../src/index'

describe('GET /:code — redirect', () => {
  beforeEach(async () => {
    // Seed D1 with a test link
    await env.DB.prepare(
      "INSERT INTO short_links (id, code, destination_url, is_active) VALUES ('link-1', 'abc123', 'https://example.com', 1)"
    ).run()
  })

  it('returns 301 from D1 on cache miss', async () => {
    const res = await app.request('/abc123', {}, env)
    expect(res.status).toBe(301)
    expect(res.headers.get('Location')).toBe('https://example.com')
  })

  it('returns 301 from KV on cache hit', async () => {
    await env.REDIRECT_CACHE.put('redirect:abc123', 'https://example.com')
    const res = await app.request('/abc123', {}, env)
    expect(res.status).toBe(301)
  })

  it('returns 404 for unknown code', async () => {
    const res = await app.request('/notexist', {}, env)
    expect(res.status).toBe(404)
  })

  it('returns 404 for inactive link', async () => {
    await env.DB.prepare("UPDATE short_links SET is_active = 0 WHERE code = 'abc123'").run()
    const res = await app.request('/abc123', {}, env)
    expect(res.status).toBe(404)
  })
})
```

---

## 6. CI/CD (GitHub Actions + Wrangler)

```yaml
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - run: npm ci

      - name: Security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high

      - run: npm run lint
      - run: npm run type-check
      - run: npm test

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci

      - name: Apply D1 migrations
        run: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply snaplink-db --remote
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}

      - name: Deploy to Cloudflare Workers
        run: npx wrangler deploy
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}

      - name: Smoke test health endpoint
        run: |
          sleep 10
          curl -f https://snaplink.workers.dev/health || exit 1
```

**Required GitHub secrets:**
- `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` — API token with Workers + D1 + KV edit permissions
- `CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID` — Cloudflare account ID

**Wrangler secrets** (set once via CLI, stored in Cloudflare):
```bash
wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET
wrangler secret put UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
wrangler secret put UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN
wrangler secret put CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
```

---

## 7. Security Files

```toml
# .gitleaks.toml
[extend]
useDefault = true

[[rules]]
description = "Cloudflare API Token"
regex = '''cf[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{40,}'''
tags = ["cloudflare", "api-token"]

[[rules]]
description = "Upstash Token"
regex = '''AX[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{40,}'''
tags = ["upstash", "redis"]
```
